---
title: "Exercise 3. Quarto features"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This is a callout.
You can use it to draw attention to important information.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
This is a tip.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
This is a warning.
:::

::: {.callout-important}
This is important information.
:::

::: {.callout-caution}
This is a caution.
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Helpful tip"}
Remember to save your file before you render.
:::

::: {.callout-note title="More details" collapse="true"}
This extra information is hidden until you click the arrow.
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
This is a simple callout.
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
This is a minimal callout.
:::

::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
Default callout with icon removed
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Helpful tip"}
Take short breaks when you are concentrating
:::

::: {.callout-note title="More information" collapse="true"}
You can come back to this note later if you need it
:::


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width=60%}
This
::: 


::: {.column width=5%}
Is
::: 


::: {.column width=35%}
Not
::: 

::::

[Visit the University of Exeter website](https://www.exeter.ac.uk){target="_blank"}

Help!!

Here is some text with a footnote.[^1]

[^1]: This is the content of the footnote.
